proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps coded 0/1/2) is associated with shorter pfs_months in this breast cancer cohort: PFS decreases monotonically as ecog_ps increases.
Patients with stage_iv == 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv == 0.
Patients with has_brain_mets == 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets == 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS by ECOG = 5.64 (PS0), 4.44 (PS1), 3.29 (PS2) months. Linear trend β = -1.180 mo per ECOG grade, p = <1e-300; ANOVA p = <1e-300. Direction confirmed: higher ECOG → shorter PFS.
Stage IV vs non-stage IV: ΔPFS = -1.536 mo (n=14969 vs 35031), p = <1e-300. Strongly supports hypothesis.
Brain mets vs no brain mets: ΔPFS = -1.050 mo (n=5090 vs 44910), p = 1.45e-178. Supports hypothesis.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with liver_mets == 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with liver_mets == 0.
Patients with bone_mets == 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with bone_mets == 0.
Patients with adrenal_mets == 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without.
Patients with pleural_effusion == 1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with node_positive == 1 have shorter pfs_months than node_positive == 0.
Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher proliferation index (ki67_pct) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: ΔPFS for liver_mets = 0.018 mo, p = 0.5547, n_pos=7546. No Shorter (Null); null at α=0.05.
ΔPFS for bone_mets = 0.038 mo, p = 0.1704, n_pos=10067. No Shorter (Null); null at α=0.05.
ΔPFS for adrenal_mets = -0.006 mo, p = 0.8633, n_pos=5056. Shorter; null at α=0.05.
ΔPFS for pleural_effusion = -0.034 mo, p = 0.2784, n_pos=7532. Shorter; null at α=0.05.
ΔPFS for node_positive = -0.024 mo, p = 0.2921, n_pos=25053. Shorter; null at α=0.05.
β = 0.0006 mo per cm, p = 0.9308. No association.
β = -0.019 mo per Ki67 percentage point, p = 2.98e-93. Negative slope confirmed.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (hypercalcemia of malignancy).

analyses.result_summary: β = 0.49877 mo per unit of albumin_g_dl, p = 9.39e-112. Significant at α=0.05.
β = -0.00051 mo per unit of ldh_u_l, p = 0.0002. Significant at α=0.05.
β = -0.00088 mo per unit of crp_mg_l, p = 0.4606. Null at α=0.05.
β = -0.00639 mo per unit of hemoglobin_g_dl, p = 0.3042. Null at α=0.05.
β = 0.00331 mo per unit of nlr, p = 0.5372. Null at α=0.05.
β = -0.07473 mo per unit of weight_loss_pct_6mo, p = 4.07e-148. Significant at α=0.05.
β = -0.00067 mo per unit of alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, p = 0.0030. Significant at α=0.05.
β = -0.06393 mo per unit of calcium_mg_dl, p = 0.0041. Significant at α=0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment with treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months (positive ΔPFS) overall.
Treatment with treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Treatment with treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Treatment with treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Treatment with treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Treatment with treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months overall.

analyses.result_summary: ΔPFS(treatment_tamoxifen) = 0.043 mo, p = 0.0769, n_treated=15035.
ΔPFS(treatment_palbociclib) = 1.098 mo, p = <1e-300, n_treated=17428.
ΔPFS(treatment_trastuzumab) = -0.060 mo, p = 0.0292, n_treated=10039.
ΔPFS(treatment_olaparib) = -0.036 mo, p = 0.3298, n_treated=4946.
ΔPFS(treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan) = -0.007 mo, p = 0.8461, n_treated=4987.
ΔPFS(treatment_pembrolizumab) = -0.074 mo, p = 0.0175, n_treated=7585.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_trastuzumab and her2_positive on pfs_months: trastuzumab improves PFS (positive ΔPFS) only in her2_positive == 1, not in her2_positive == 0.
Within her2_positive == 1, treatment_trastuzumab patients have longer pfs_months than non-treated.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = -0.028, p = 0.6946. NOT significant — no biomarker-matched benefit detected for trastuzumab.
In HER2+ (n=9060): on-treatment 4.254 mo vs off 4.334 mo, ΔPFS = -0.079, p = 0.1530. Refutes hypothesis: trastuzumab does NOT extend PFS in HER2+.
In HER2- (n=40940): ΔPFS = -0.051, p = 0.1043. Also null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_tamoxifen and er_positive on pfs_months: tamoxifen extends PFS in er_positive == 1 but not in er_positive == 0.
Within er_positive == 1, treatment_tamoxifen patients have longer pfs_months than non-treated.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = -0.058, p = 0.2701. Not significant — no detectable ER-restricted benefit of tamoxifen.
In ER+: ΔPFS(0.023) mo, p = 0.4498. Refutes hypothesis (no benefit even in the matched subgroup).
In ER- (n=15114): ΔPFS = 0.081 mo, p = 0.0300. A small positive effect appears in ER- (opposite of biological expectation), suggesting selection-by-indication confounding rather than true effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and germline BRCA status (brca1_mutation==1 OR brca2_mutation==1) on pfs_months: olaparib improves PFS only in BRCA-mutated patients.
Within BRCA-mutated patients, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than non-treated.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = 0.402, p = 0.0208. Significant positive interaction supporting the synthetic-lethality hypothesis.
In BRCA-mutated (n=2499): on-olaparib 4.933 vs off 4.587 months, ΔPFS = +0.346 mo, p = 0.0414. Supports hypothesis.
In BRCA wildtype: ΔPFS = -0.056 mo, p = 0.1427. Null in unselected patients, as expected.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_palbociclib and the joint subgroup (er_positive==1 AND postmenopausal==1) on pfs_months: palbociclib's PFS benefit is concentrated in ER+ postmenopausal patients (the on-label CDK4/6 indication).
Within er_positive == 1, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months than non-treated; within er_positive == 0, treatment_palbociclib has no effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = 0.698 mo, p = 2.32e-51. Strong positive interaction. In ER+/postmen on palbociclib: 5.827 vs off 4.325 mo, ΔPFS = +1.502 mo, p = 4.35e-283.
In ER+: ΔPFS = +1.577 mo, p = <1e-300. Strongly supports.
In ER-: ΔPFS = -0.017 mo, p = 0.6272. Null in non-target subgroup, as expected.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months: pembrolizumab improves PFS only in msi_high == 1.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and triple-negative status (er_positive==0 AND pr_positive==0 AND her2_positive==0): pembrolizumab improves PFS in TNBC.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = 0.217, p = 0.4656. Not significant; subgroup very small (msi_high prevalence ≈1%).
In MSI-high (n=498): ΔPFS = 0.141 mo, p = 0.6375. Direction is positive but null.
Interaction β = 0.185, p = 0.0152. Modest interaction. In TNBC ΔPFS = 0.072 (p = 0.2223); in non-TNBC pembro is associated with shorter PFS (-0.114, p = 0.0017).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan and triple-negative status on pfs_months: sacituzumab govitecan improves PFS in TNBC.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan and her2_low on pfs_months: sacituzumab govitecan improves PFS in HER2-low patients.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = -0.105, p = 0.2458. Not significant. In TNBC: ΔPFS = -0.085, p = 0.2173; in non-TNBC: ΔPFS = 0.019.
Interaction β = -0.038, p = 0.6262. Not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with pik3ca_mutation == 1 have shorter pfs_months than pik3ca_mutation == 0.
Patients with tp53_mutation == 1 have shorter pfs_months than tp53_mutation == 0.

analyses.result_summary: ΔPFS = -0.559 mo, p = 6.07e-144. Strongly significant; PIK3CA-mutated patients have ~0.56 mo shorter PFS.
ΔPFS = 0.007 mo, p = 0.7619. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade (CTCAE-style 0-4) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs (numeric rating scale) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher cough_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: β = 0.0005 mo per grade, p = 0.9628. Null.
β = -0.0015 mo per grade, p = 0.7202. Null.
β = 0.0104 mo per grade, p = 0.2989. Null.
β = -0.0018 mo per grade, p = 0.8606. Null.
β = -0.0089 mo per grade, p = 0.3844. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: diabetes_mellitus == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
chronic_kidney_disease == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
heart_failure == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
autoimmune_disease == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
depression_anxiety_diagnosis == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
prior_malignancy == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Older age (age_years, continuous) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope), reflecting frailty and reduced tolerability of therapy.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope), reflecting accumulating resistance.
Greater years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months on the current line.

analyses.result_summary: β = 0.176 mo per year of age, p = <1e-300. Direction is OPPOSITE the hypothesis: older patients have LONGER PFS (likely reflecting lower-aggressiveness/biology selection or treatment-selection bias).
β = 0.0093 mo per prior line, p = 0.3431. Null.
β = -0.0032 mo per year, p = 0.6300. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity groups (any-vs-any), reflecting disparities in access or biology.
pfs_months differs by insurance_type, with private insurance associated with longer PFS than public.
rural_residence == 1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than urban (rural_residence == 0).
More education_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).

analyses.result_summary: ANOVA across 5 race/ethnicity levels: p = 0.4939. No detectable disparity.
ANOVA across 4 insurance types: p = 0.8179. No detectable disparity.
ΔPFS rural vs urban = 0.027 mo, p = 0.3426. Null.
β = -0.0032 mo per year of education, p = 0.3877. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable linear regression of pfs_months on ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, bone_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, age_years, and prior_lines_of_therapy, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, and age_years are each independently statistically significant predictors with the directions established in iterations 1, 3, and 14.

analyses.code: ols pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + crp_mg_l + age_years + prior_lines_of_therapy
analyses.result_summary: R² = 0.698. Independent predictors (β [p]): ecog_ps -1.166 [<1e-300], stage_iv -1.546 [<1e-300], has_brain_mets -0.991 [<1e-300], albumin_g_dl 0.482 [<1e-300], ldh_u_l -0.00056 [1.20e-13], age_years 0.176 [<1e-300]. liver_mets, bone_mets, crp_mg_l, prior_lines: null after adjustment. Hypothesis supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between treatment_tamoxifen and snp_rs1065852 (a CYP2D6 *4-related variant) on pfs_months: tamoxifen's PFS benefit is reduced in carriers of snp_rs1065852.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_tamoxifen and snp_rs3813867 (a CYP2E1 promoter variant) on pfs_months.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_tamoxifen and snp_rs1800566 (NQO1) on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = -0.0024, p = 0.9747. Null.
Interaction β = 0.0294, p = 0.7909. Null.
Interaction β = -0.0048, p = 0.9229. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The single-locus variant snp_rs1801131 has a non-zero main effect on pfs_months (any direction), tested at Bonferroni-corrected α=0.05 across 24 SNPs.
The single-locus variant snp_rs2298771 has a non-zero main effect on pfs_months (any direction), tested at Bonferroni-corrected α=0.05 across 24 SNPs.
The single-locus variant snp_rs1799983 has a non-zero main effect on pfs_months (any direction), tested at Bonferroni-corrected α=0.05 across 24 SNPs.
The single-locus variant snp_rs662 has a non-zero main effect on pfs_months (any direction), tested at Bonferroni-corrected α=0.05 across 24 SNPs.
The single-locus variant snp_rs1045642 has a non-zero main effect on pfs_months (any direction), tested at Bonferroni-corrected α=0.05 across 24 SNPs.

analyses.result_summary: β = -0.0539 mo, p = 0.0264. Bonferroni-corrected (×24) p = 0.6346. Not significant after correction.
β = 0.0483 mo, p = 0.0822. Bonferroni-corrected (×24) p = 1.9719. Not significant after correction.
β = -0.0366 mo, p = 0.1179. Bonferroni-corrected (×24) p = 2.8290. Not significant after correction.
β = -0.0331 mo, p = 0.1733. Bonferroni-corrected (×24) p = 4.1590. Not significant after correction.
β = -0.0289 mo, p = 0.1980. Bonferroni-corrected (×24) p = 4.7513. Not significant after correction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca1_mutation == 1, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than non-treated; the interaction term treatment_olaparib × brca1_mutation in an OLS model is positive.
Within brca2_mutation == 1, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months than non-treated; the interaction term treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = +0.446, p = 0.0659. In BRCA1+ on olaparib (n=120): 5.030 vs off 4.632 mo (Δ = +0.398, p = 0.1167). Trend supports hypothesis but underpowered for separate-locus test.
Interaction β = +0.340, p = 0.1632. In BRCA2+ on olaparib (n=119): Δ = +0.295 mo, p = 0.1918. Same direction; not individually significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with er_positive == 1 have longer pfs_months than er_positive == 0 (positive ΔPFS).
Patients with pr_positive == 1 have longer pfs_months than pr_positive == 0.
Patients with her2_positive == 1 have shorter pfs_months than her2_positive == 0.
Patients with triple-negative breast cancer (er==0, pr==0, her2==0) have shorter pfs_months than non-TNBC.
Patients with her2_low == 1 have longer pfs_months than her2_low == 0.
Patients with postmenopausal == 1 have different pfs_months than postmenopausal == 0.

analyses.result_summary: ΔPFS = +0.568 mo, p = 3.70e-143. Strongly supports.
ΔPFS = +0.362 mo, p = 5.82e-59. Supports.
ΔPFS = -0.459 mo, p = 6.10e-70. Supports.
ΔPFS = -0.491 mo, p = 9.72e-90. Strongly supports.
ΔPFS = +0.114 mo, p = 1.04e-06. Modest support; HER2-low ≈ better than non-low.
ΔPFS = -0.023 mo, p = 0.3108. Null overall (effect emerges only when interacting with palbociclib, see iter 8).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher heart_rate_bpm is associated with shorter pfs_months (sympathetic stress / cachexia).
Higher spo2_pct is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher systolic_bp_mmhg is associated with longer pfs_months (intact cardiovascular reserve).
Higher diastolic_bp_mmhg is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher bmi is associated with longer pfs_months (obesity paradox in advanced cancer).

analyses.result_summary: β = 0.00097 mo per unit, p = 0.2988. Null.
β = 0.00522 mo per unit, p = 0.3532. Null.
β = 0.00064 mo per unit, p = 0.3876. Null.
β = 0.00089 mo per unit, p = 0.4293. Null.
β = 0.00362 mo per unit, p = 0.1050. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ast_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alt_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher bun_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Lower sodium_meq_l (hyponatremia) is associated with shorter pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher glucose_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: β = -0.07050 mo, p = 0.0458. Significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ca_125_u_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alc_k_ul (absolute lymphocyte count) is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher inr is associated with shorter pfs_months.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_trastuzumab and her2_low on pfs_months: trastuzumab improves PFS in HER2-low patients (off-label expansion hypothesis).
Patients with her2_amplification == 1 have different pfs_months than her2_amplification == 0.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_trastuzumab and her2_amplification on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β = 0.068, p = 0.2410. Null.
ΔPFS = 0.060 mo, p = 0.3821, n=1467. Null (a small subgroup).
Interaction β = 0.038, p = 0.8142. Null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment for prognostic factors (ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l) and including all five biomarker–treatment interaction terms simultaneously (trastuzumab×her2_positive, tamoxifen×er_positive, olaparib×brca_any, palbociclib×(er_positive & postmenopausal), pembrolizumab×msi_high), only the palbociclib × ER+/postmenopausal interaction remains statistically significant with a positive coefficient.

analyses.code: ols pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + trastuzumab*her2_positive + tamoxifen*er_positive + olaparib*brca_any + palbociclib*er_postmen + pembrolizumab*msi_high
analyses.result_summary: R²=0.273, n=50000. Interaction coefficients [p]: trastuzumab×her2_positive -0.008 [0.8924]; tamoxifen×er_positive -0.054 [0.2351]; olaparib×brca_any 0.196 [0.1876]; palbociclib×ER+postmen +0.717 [4.96e-70]; pembrolizumab×msi_high 0.075 [0.7679]. Only palbociclib × ER+/postmenopausal survives; consistent with hypothesis.
